name: automation/tests/test_stream.py::test_stream_sample_quality
message:
缺包率 0.6364% 超过阈值 0.5%
assert 0.6364 <= 0.5
 +  where 0.6364 = StreamStats(model='h1', host='192.168.1.86', started_at_s=192623.093, ended_at_s=192633.109, frames_received=3279, scans_seen=150, completed_scans=149, points_received=402577, parse_errors=0, duplicate_packets=0, missing_packets=21, expected_packets=3300, loss_rate_percent=0.6364, frame_rate_hz=327.3762, max_inter_frame_gap_s=0.032, reconnect_count=0, longest_data_gap_s=0.032, notes=[]).loss_rate_percent
 +  and   0.5 = DeviceConfig(model='h1', host='192.168.1.86', port=2111, name='H1-样机', connect_timeout_s=5.0, recv_timeout_s=0.5, report_dir='network_test/automation/reports_output', raw_dir='network_test/automation/raw_output', commands=CommandConfig(h1_login_permission=3, h1_login_password_hex='F4 72 47 44', single_scan_hex='02 02 02 02 00 09 02 30 43', start_stream_hex='02 02 02 02 00 0A 02 31 01 46', stop_stream_hex='02 02 02 02 00 0A 02 31 00 45', c2_query_config_hex='02 02 02 02 00 09 00 1A 2B', read_ip_hex='02 02 02 02 00 09 00 10 21', read_gateway_hex='02 02 02 02 00 09 00 12 23', read_subnet_mask_hex='02 02 02 02 00 09 00 14 25', read_freq_resolution_hex='02 02 02 02 00 09 00 1A 2B'), ping=PingConfig(duration_s=604800.0, pytest_duration_s=10.0, interval_s=1.0, timeout_ms=1000, packet_size=32), stream=StreamConfig(sample_cycles=5000, sample_duration_s=10.0, expected_points_per_scan=2701, expected_packets_per_scan=22, scan_start_deg=-45.0, angle_resolution_deg=0.1, expected_frame_rate_hz=15.0), thresholds=ThresholdConfig(ping_success_rate_min_percent=99.9, protocol_success_rate_min_percent=100.0, c2_recovery_timeout_s=10.0, h1_recovery_timeout_s=5.0, stream_loss_rate_max_percent=1.0, h1_stream_loss_rate_max_percent=0.5, frame_rate_tolerance_percent=10.0)).stream_loss_limit_percent
metrics: {"model": "h1", "host": "192.168.1.86", "started_at_s": 192623.093, "ended_at_s": 192633.109, "frames_received": 3279, "scans_seen": 150, "completed_scans": 149, "points_received": 402577, "parse_errors": 0, "duplicate_packets": 0, "missing_packets": 21, "expected_packets": 3300, "loss_rate_percent": 0.6364, "frame_rate_hz": 327.3762, "max_inter_frame_gap_s": 0.032, "reconnect_count": 0, "longest_data_gap_s": 0.032, "notes": [], "window_duration_s": 10.016, "implied_scan_rate_hz": 14.8807, "completed_scan_rate_hz": 14.8762, "expected_scan_rate_hz": 15.0, "scan_rate_vs_expected_error_percent": 0.7953, "frame_rate_tolerance_percent_applied": 10.0, "sample_cycles_met": false, "sample_duration_met": true, "metric_explanations": {"model": "设备型号（c2/h1），与配置一致。", "host": "被测雷达 IP。", "started_at_s": "统计窗口开始时刻（time.monotonic 秒），非墙钟。", "ended_at_s": "统计窗口结束时刻；与 started 之差 ≈ 采样时长。", "frames_received": "成功解析并计入统计的 TCP 应用层帧总数。", "scans_seen": "观测到的不重复扫描圈号（scan_id）个数。", "completed_scans": "包号齐全（每圈收满 expected_packets_per_scan）的完整圈数。", "points_received": "各帧点数之和，粗看吞吐；不单独校验每点正确性。", "parse_errors": "无法按协议解析的帧数；>0 时查粘包/校验/固件。", "duplicate_packets": "同一 (圈号, 包号) 重复到达次数。", "missing_packets": "按每圈应有包数推算的缺包总数。", "expected_packets": "理论应收包数 = 参与统计的圈数 × 每圈应有包数。", "loss_rate_percent": "缺包率(%) = missing_packets / expected_packets × 100；与准入阈值比对。", "frame_rate_hz": "平均帧率 = frames_received / 窗口秒数。", "max_inter_frame_gap_s": "相邻两帧接收时间间隔的最大值（秒）。", "reconnect_count": "本窗口内记录的重连次数（本短测通常为 0）。", "longest_data_gap_s": "与 max_inter_frame_gap_s 同源，报告字段兼容用。", "notes": "附加说明字符串列表。", "stream_loss_limit_percent_applied": "本用例实际使用的缺包率准入阈值（%），来自配置 thresholds。", "sample_cycles_applied": "本测传入 read_stream_stats 的 max_cycles：收满多少完整圈后停止。", "sample_duration_s_applied": "本测采样时长上限（秒）；与 sample_cycles 先满足其一即停止收数。", "window_duration_s": "本窗口有效统计时长（秒）= ended_at_s - started_at_s，用于折算频率。", "implied_scan_rate_hz": "推算扫描频率（圈/秒）= frame_rate_hz ÷ expected_packets_per_scan；每圈一包序列为 1 圈。", "completed_scan_rate_hz": "完整圈频率（圈/秒）= completed_scans ÷ window_duration_s；仅统计包号齐全的圈。", "expected_scan_rate_hz": "配置期望扫描频率（Hz），来自 stream.expected_frame_rate_hz。", "scan_rate_vs_expected_error_percent": "|implied_scan_rate_hz - expected_scan_rate_hz| / 期望 × 100；与 frame_rate 容差比对。", "frame_rate_tolerance_percent_applied": "本用例扫描频率相对误差上限（%），来自 thresholds.frame_rate_tolerance_percent。", "sample_cycles_met": "是否已收满 sample_cycles 个完整圈（completed_scans ≥ 配置值）。", "sample_duration_met": "是否已跑满 sample_duration_s 时长上限（window_duration_s ≥ 配置×0.98）。"}, "stream_loss_limit_percent_applied": 0.5, "sample_cycles_applied": 5000, "sample_duration_s_applied": 10.0}
